login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.

register.subtitle: Get started with Openship in seconds.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentDescription: We sent a password reset link to {email}. It may take a minute to arrive.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
resetPassword.doneDescription: Your password has been updated successfully.

verifyEmail.verifiedDescription: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.errorDescription: The link may have expired or is invalid.
verifyEmail.pendingSentTo: We sent a verification link to {email}. Check your inbox and click the link to continue.
verifyEmail.pendingGeneric: Check your inbox for a verification link.

errors.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Is the API running?
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.oauthFailed: OAuth sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.invalidToken: Invalid or missing reset token. Please request a new link.
errors.verificationExpired: Verification failed. The link may have expired.
errors.resendFailed: Failed to resend. Please try again.
